ground_truth.title: Private Music Lesson Package
ground_truth.main_content:
Music Lessons - 4 lesson package

We offer private lessons for the following instruments: Saxophone • Flute • Trumpet • Clarinet • Trombone • Piano • Drums • Guitar • Bass • Violin • Folk and Bluegrass Instruments • Voice • All Reeds and Low Brass • And we are adding more every week!

We offer private lessons Weekdays, Evenings, and Saturdays!

After purchase, Portman's Music Academy staff will contact you to set up your lessons:

Tell us your musical goals.
We'll help you choose the teacher most appropriate for you.
We'll help you choose a convenient time for you and your child.
Schedule all family members simultaneously, and save on gas money and time!

We have professional, well-equipped studios and a waiting area for parents and siblings.

Register today for the best choice of lesson times!

Includes annual registration fee plus 4 half-hour lessons.
